description_long: This object is a whimsical record player designed to resemble a vintage portable turntable, with a suitcase-like body and a hinged lid. The lid is open and decorated with lush, stylized foliage and yellow flowers, giving the impression that nature is growing out of the device. The platter is semi-transparent and circular, with a central spindle and a visible tonearm resting on its side. The casing is a muted beige with subtle accents, and the front features latches and a handle, enhancing its portable appearance. The overall design blends retro technology with organic elements, making it visually striking and unique. The record player appears to be made primarily of plastic or composite materials, with decorative plant elements likely crafted from lightweight plastic or resin.
description: A vintage-style portable record player with an open lid, decorated with stylized foliage and flowers, featuring a semi-transparent platter and a resting tonearm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with abundant foliage, the platter, tonearm, and front latches clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the foliage and the side profile of the platter and tonearm.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the lid with some foliage peeking out from the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the tonearm, platter, and the arrangement of foliage along the right edge.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and semi-transparent with a central spindle. It occupies a prominent position in the lower half of the device and appears smooth, with a subtle frosted finish and no visible grooves or patterns.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, resting diagonally across the platter. It is medium-length, cylindrical, and appears to be made of brown plastic or resin, with a rounded end and a visible pivot joint at its base.
attribute_control_knobs: There are two small, round control knobs located on the front right side of the base, appearing to be made of brown plastic. No visible labels or markings are present.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present in the form of the hinged suitcase lid, made of opaque beige plastic. It is open and attached with side hinges, with no transparency or handles visible.
